{{Quote|Okay, cap'n. Soup's on!|Farlie|<ref name="marvel63" />}}
'''Farlie''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] cook stationed at the [[Krake Data Vault]] on [[Krake's Planet]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. Farlie often allowed higher ranked Imperial officers to eat in his kitchen on paydays, so they could avoid busy rushes. On one such payday, Farlie was on duty when [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operatives [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] infiltrated the vault, looking to tap into the vault's central databank through Farlie's kitchen terminal for information on Imperial double agent [[Lumiya|Shira Brie]]. The Rebels destroyed the vault shortly afterward, killing all aboard.<ref name="marvel63" />

==Behind the scenes==
Farlie appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 63|''Star Wars'' (1977) 63]], written by [[David Michelinie]] and [[Walter Simonson]], illustrated by [[Tom Palmer]] and released in [[1982]].<ref name="marvel63" />
